title: Flask route ownership manifest
scope: All legacy Flask url_map entries plus the matching Go primary product surface. Flask handler names are retained as historical provenance; the Python source was removed in T053; production ownership reflects the Go primary runtime after T042-T050.
boundary: T051 current-truth refresh: product startup, Pi live Caddy traffic, and package paths are Go primary. Python backend source was removed in T053; Go primary is the sole runtime owner.

current_owner_basis: scripts/start_go_primary.ps1 enables Go route classes for product startup
scripts/go_primary_pi_live_ops.ps1 installs prism-go-primary.service at 127.0.0.1:5004 and Caddy routes to Go primary
docs/contracts/go-primary-frontend-route-coverage.json closes T047-T050 frontend-called Go route gaps
go_candidate_field_note: Existing go_candidate values are historical implementation provenance from local/copied gates; production_owner is the current owner field after T051.
